zh.lifeSummary: 當Norman Leslie於大約1305年出生時，他的父親Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie27歲，母親Mary de Abernethy18歲。他和Elizabeth Kieth至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1365年11月在希臘素斯 艾格恩羅茲享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Norman Leslie于大约1305年出生时，他的父亲Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie27岁，母亲Mary de Abernethy18岁。他和Elizabeth Kieth至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1365年11月在希腊素斯 艾格恩羅茲享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

en.lifeSummary: When Norman Leslie was born about 1305, his father, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, was 27 and his mother, Mary de Abernethy, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Elizabeth Kieth. He died about November 1365, in Rhodes, South Aegean, Greece, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Norman Leslie est né environ 1305, son père, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary de Abernethy, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elizabeth Kieth. Il est décédé environ novembre 1365, à Rhodes, Notio Aigaio, Grèce, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Norman Leslie um 1305 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie 27 und seine Mutter Mary de Abernethy 18. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Kieth mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um November 1365 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Rhodes, Notio Aigaio, Griechenland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Norman Leslie è nato il circa 1305, il suo padre, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Abernethy, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Elizabeth Kieth. Morì circa novembre 1365, nel Rhodes, Notio Aigaio, Grecia, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Norman Leslie(이)가 대략 1305년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Abernethy(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Kieth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1365년 11월 그리스 소우스 아이그이 호데스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Norman Leslie nasceu aproximadamente 1305, seu pai, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Abernethy, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Elizabeth Kieth. Ele faleceu aproximadamente novembro de 1365, em Rhodes, Notio Aigaio, Grécia, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Norman Leslie родился около 1305 г., его отцу по имени Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Abernethy, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Elizabeth Kieth. Он умер около ноябрь 1365 г. в местности родесь, соут аегин, Греция в возрасте 61 год.
